description: Read a unified knowledge document by type-prefixed path. This tool returns plain-text document content in markdown form, not knowledge metadata or directory config.

path.description: The type-prefixed knowledge document path, for example `design/core-loop.md` or `skill/unity/import-pipeline.md`.

part.description: Which content section to read. `full` returns the markdown document body, `summary` returns the summary text only, and `body` returns the body text only.
